title: TrafficLogPayload
description: Schema for a forwarded PAN-OS traffic log entry. Traffic logs capture session metadata for every network connection processed by the firewall, providing comprehensive network visibility for security operations, compliance, and analytics.

receive_time.description: Timestamp when the log entry was received by Strata Logging Service from the generating firewall device.

serial.description: Serial number of the Palo Alto Networks firewall or Prisma Access node that generated this log entry.

type.description: Log type identifier, always TRAFFIC for traffic log entries.

subtype.description: Traffic log subtype indicating what session lifecycle event triggered this log entry.

src.description: Source IP address of the network session.

dst.description: Destination IP address of the network session.

sport.description: Source port number of the network session.

dport.description: Destination port number of the network session.

proto.description: IP protocol name or number for the session (e.g., tcp, udp, icmp).

app.description: Application identified by PAN-OS App-ID, such as ssl, web-browsing, dns, or a specific SaaS application name.

action.description: Enforcement action applied to the session by the matching security policy rule.

bytes_sent.description: Total bytes sent from client to server in this session.

bytes_received.description: Total bytes received by client from server in this session.

session_id.description: Unique session identifier assigned by the firewall for this network session.

rule_name.description: Name of the security policy rule that matched and processed this session.

src_zone.description: Source security zone from which the session originated.

dst_zone.description: Destination security zone to which the session is destined.

src_user.description: Source user identity associated with the session if User-ID is enabled on the ingress zone.

nat_src.description: Post-NAT source IP address after address translation.

nat_dst.description: Post-NAT destination IP address after address translation.

nat_sport.description: Post-NAT source port after port address translation.

nat_dport.description: Post-NAT destination port after port address translation.

packets_sent.description: Total packets sent from client in this session.

packets_received.description: Total packets received by client in this session.

device_name.description: Hostname of the firewall that generated this log entry.

vsys.description: Virtual system name or identifier on the firewall.

log_forwarding_profile.description: Name of the Strata Logging Service log forwarding profile that forwarded this log entry.

output_format.description: Output format in which this log entry was forwarded to the destination.
